name: remove_annotated_delay
full_help:
remove_annotated_delay

Description: 
remove annotated delay

Syntax: 
remove_annotated_delay  [-from <args>] [-to <args>] [-all] [-of_objects <args>]
                        [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-from]        From pins or top level ports
  [-to]          To pins or top level ports
  [-all]         Specifies that all annotated delays are removed
  [-of_objects]  List of timing arcs
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Timing
